name: check-in-luv
description: Private couple check-in PWA with Fastify API and admin dashboard.

scripts.build: npm run build -w @lovecheck/api && npm run build -w @lovecheck/web && npm run build -w @lovecheck/admin
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck -w @lovecheck/api && npm run typecheck -w @lovecheck/web && npm run typecheck -w @lovecheck/admin
